overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking through an ancient Greek city. The character moves from a courtyard with a leopard, through a market bazaar with merchant stalls, up a grand marble staircase, and along a terrace toward a distant temple with mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with decorative urns approaching market district

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the marble courtyard toward the market entrance

notable_agents.action: leopard walking across the courtyard from left to right
pedestrian in white robes walking ahead toward the market

entered.detail: large ornate golden urn with intricate patterns sitting on white pedestal
white marble building with tall columns and blue doorways
tall monument with golden eagle statues perched atop stone pillars
wooden merchant cart with wheels and goods

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit marble courtyard with a large golden urn on the right. A leopard crosses the courtyard on the left while the character approaches a distant monument with eagle statues and a market area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market bazaar with fabric awnings and merchant stalls

passes stone lattice grates embedded in the marble floor

agents.ego_description: navigating through the market area passing various merchant stalls and displays

notable_agents.action: merchant in robes standing beside a stall
pedestrian walking in the opposite direction through the market

entered.detail: blue fabric canopy stretched between poles covering the market walkway
white marble counter with red cloth and displayed goods
decorative square stone grates set into the pavement

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a covered market bazaar shaded by blue fabric awnings. Marble merchant stalls line the path displaying various goods, while pedestrians move through the area. The eagle monument remains visible in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase and upper terrace with mountain views

events.description: begins ascending wide marble staircase with yellow trim
reaches top of stairs entering open upper terrace with temple view

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand marble staircase toward the upper city level

notable_agents.action: leopard descending the stairs on the right side
pedestrian in yellow robes walking up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide white marble steps with yellow gold trim leading upward
large rectangular stone planter with red flowers and greenery
distant mountains visible beyond the city walls under blue sky
tall white temple structure with vertical spires and golden accents

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand marble staircase flanked by stone planters, passing a leopard descending on the right. Upon reaching the top, the view opens to reveal distant mountains and a tall temple with spires ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace promenade with temple approach and scattered ruins

events.description: passes large bronze brazier with flames burning on the right
approaching area with scattered ancient column ruins

agents.ego_description: walking along the wide terrace toward the distant temple complex

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow robes walking toward the camera
group of citizens walking ahead on the terrace

entered.detail: large bronze brazier with bright flames on a stone pedestal
scattered broken stone columns and archaeological remains
large ornate stone planter with gold trim containing greenery

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wide upper terrace with the temple spires growing larger ahead. A burning brazier marks the path on the right, while ancient ruins and columns appear scattered around the area. Pedestrians in period clothing move along the promenade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit marble courtyard through a bustling bazaar and up toward a grand temple overlooking a mountain range. It begins in an open plaza where a leopard crosses the path beside a golden urn, moving forward toward a distant monument with eagle statues. As the character enters the market bazaar, the bright sunlight shifts into the shade of blue fabric awnings and marble merchant stalls filled with goods and pedestrians. The scene then ascends a grand marble staircase flanked by stone planters, passing another leopard before the view opens up to reveal a distant temple and towering mountains. Finally, the camera follows the character along a wide upper terrace past burning braziers and scattered ruins, with the temple spires growing larger as they approach the destination.
